ModMetaData.name: Young and Old Hairs
ModMetaData.author: Deebs
ModMetaData.description:
Ever have an infant age up into a child and they're already balding? Have elders visit your colony with surprisingly youthful hairstyles? Does it get under your skin, even a little tiny bit?
Young and Old Hair is a mod and framework for setting age groups for hairstyles, so pawns will no longer age into or spawn in with unfitting hair.
It categorizes a few of the basegame's hairstyles into age groups by default to demonstrate it's ability and also serve as a guide for anyone who wants to add age groups to their modded hair.
You SHOULD still be able to stylize your pawns hair however you like regardless of age, so if you want a two year old with a combover, you can.
Commissioned by Deebs and coded by the incomparable Taranchuk!
Enjoy!
